Metadata.homeDescription: A bounded, private foresight experience—compliant, confidential, reviewable.

Home.heroLead: Decision fatigue and endless feeds rarely fix what hurts—you need one bounded session that aligns you with a plausible you. Shì Wèi, within strict ethics and time limits, lets you preview only your trajectory fragments—then bring that clarity back to the present.
Home.priceTag: Single session · Private facilitation · Compliance log · View plans
Home.caption: Observation field · you only
Home.v1p: Turn “if I keep going like this” into describable, reviewable imagery—less rumination, more agency.
Home.v2p: Only your path, only ten years, observe-don’t-intervene—rules that keep the experience psychologically and ethically sound.
Home.v3p: Structured summaries and path templates you can carry, execute, and audit (see Plans).
Home.problemBody: You simulate futures in your head but lack a reference line that belongs only to you. Comparing yourself to others’ highlight reels amplifies anxiety; generic advice doesn’t bear your consequences. You need a bounded, reviewable focal session—not prophecy, but compressing fog into actionable clarity.
Home.solutionBody: Within our compliance frame, you receive controlled “observation” of imagery and structure tied to your decisions—never other people’s spoilers. Leave with a summary and templates your team—or you—can run with.
Home.exploreLead: Same layout and components for every locale—the entries below are the full topical pages.
Home.teaserProcessP: Four steps, compliance rigor, observation room design, and the “now → +10y” narrative axis.
Home.teaserRulesP: Why not others, why ten years—constraints as safety and effectiveness.
Home.teaserTestimonialsP: Anonymous testimonials and synthetic case visuals.
Home.teaserPricingP: Three tiers, comparison, billing FAQs, archive UI cues.
Home.teaserTeamP: Bios, research lineage, and our duty of care for “seeing.”
Home.teaserFaqP: Validation, scheduling, refunds, data, minors—skimmable Q&A.
Home.footnote: Need a statement of work or enterprise procurement? See <services>Services</services> or <contact>Contact</contact>. Concept site; real offerings subject to contract and regulation.
Home.stickyHint: Compliance queue · reply within one business day

Booking.title: Book observation
Booking.questionLabel: Session focus, city, timing constraints, anything else we should know
Booking.successDetail: We’ll email you within one business day to confirm timing and compliance brief. If the database is configured, your row is already in the queue.

Inner.processLead: From compliance to debrief—four steps. Expand copy in messages/*.json; rich HTML remains in the repo root .html files for reference.
Inner.rulesLead: Ten-year cap, no third-party viewing, observe-don’t-intervene.
Inner.stubNote: Full static pages live alongside this app under the project root for reference during migration.
Inner.termsLead: Sample copy—have counsel review before launch. Long form: terms.html at project root.
Inner.privacyLead: Sample data-handling statement. Full page: privacy.html at project root.

Portal.title: Client portal
Portal.lead: After sign-in: encrypted observation logs, booking status, and deliverables. This is a concept shell—no IdP wired yet. The route is ready for Supabase Auth or enterprise SSO.
